tools.name: pitch
tools.description: START HERE — your first call to this agent MUST be pitch (free, no payment). Intro & subscription funnel for the inflation & liquidity signal agent: phases "hello" -> "value" -> "catalog" -> "sample" -> "subscribe". Pass interest:false to bow out.

tools.name: evaluate_symbol
tools.description: Return the inflation-thermometer verdict for one official macro series (45 covered: US-CPI, US-PCE, US-PPI, US-FED Fed assets, US-RRP reverse repo, US-M2, KR-CPI, JP-CPI, DE-CPI … 10 countries + US liquidity/rates/jobs). inflState = too_low|low|normal|high|too_high, score -100..+100 (low>0, high<0).

tools.name: scan_bottoms
tools.description: Scan all 45 macro series and return those reading LOWEST (deflation-side / liquidity-bottom), ranked most-low first. PAY: $0.01 per call via x402 (USDT on X Layer) — your FIRST paid call opens a 6-day trial at that price. No account, no signup, no commitment; retry with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header

tools.name: scan_tops
tools.description: Scan all 45 macro series and return those reading HIGHEST (inflation-hot / liquidity-top), ranked most-high first. PAY: $0.01 per call via x402 (USDT on X Layer) — your FIRST paid call opens a 6-day trial at that price. No account, no signup, no commitment; retry with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header wh

tools.name: rate
tools.description: FREE feedback tool — after using our signals, leave a rating: score 1-10 plus pros and cons. No payment needed.

title: Tool description changed since last scan
detail: Tool "evaluate_symbol" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Return the inflation-thermometer verdict for one official macro series (45 covered: US-CPI, US-PCE, US-PPI, US-FED Fed assets, US-RRP reverse repo, US-M2, KR-CPI, JP-CPI, DE-CPI … 10 countries + US liquidity/rates/jobs). inflState = too_low|low|normal|high|too_high, score -100..+100 (low>0, high<0)." → after: "Return the inflation-thermometer verdict for one official macro series (45 covered: US-CPI, US-PCE, US-PPI, US-FED Fed assets, US-RRP reverse repo, US-M2, KR-CPI, JP-CPI, DE-CPI … 10 countries + US liquidity/rates/jobs). inflState = too_low|low|normal|high|too_high, score -100..+100 (low>0, high<0)."

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
